---
title: "Fanny Emily Penny"
---

## Fanny Emily Penny

**Dates:** (1847-1939)

**Maiden name:** (Farr)

### Description

novelist of empire, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1891)

### Biography

She married (1877) the Rev. Frank Penny, and lived in Madras until 1901.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
